title: EXPOSE (EXecutables for OGC API PrOcesses and Scientific Environments) platform
description: Software platform integrating pygeoapi process plugins and a generic processor provider (execution service) to expose and run scientific command-line processing codes via the OGC API - Processes standard.

creators.name: Martinelli, Francesco
creators.affiliation: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)

related_identifiers._comment: Plugins for the EXPOSE platform project
pybox: Scientific processing code executed via these plugins
